errors.connection_failed: Failed to connect to Tuya device
errors.invalid_credentials: Invalid device ID or local key

credentials.title: Device Credentials
credentials.description: Enter the connection details for your Tuya device. You can find these in the Tuya IoT Platform or using tools like tinytuya.
credentials.name: Device Name
credentials.host_hint: IP address or hostname of the Tuya device on your local network.
credentials.node_id_hint: Only needed for sub-devices connected via a Tuya hub/gateway.

validate.title: Validate Connection
validate.description: Testing connection to your Tuya device...

repair.title: Update Connection Details
repair.description: Update the host, local key, or protocol version if your device has changed IP or been re-paired.

settings.host_hint: IP address or hostname of the Tuya device.
settings.local_key_hint: The local encryption key for the device.
settings.protocol_version_hint: The Tuya protocol version used by the device.
settings.node_id_hint: Optional sub-device node ID for hub-connected devices.
settings.poll_interval_hint: Fallback polling interval in seconds when the device does not push updates.
